description: Returns the details for a specified Custom Field Definition

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The extended view provides what is shown below.
The default view returns the same as the extended view but excludes the attribute custom_field_lov_entries.
The with_lov_entries view is the same as ...

parameters.name: includes_configurable_field_sets_count
parameters.description: If true, response will include the number of field sets using item (custom field).

active.description: Whether or not the Custom Field Definition is active

variant.description: The variant type of the Custom Field

default_value.description: Text displayed on Read Only variant

configurable_field_sets_count.description: Number of Configurable Field Sets associated with the Custom Field

position.description: Position is sorted descending, highest position is visually the top of the list.

active.description: Whether or not the Custom Field Lov Entry is active
